title: Spooky Scary Skeletons
description: A mod that adds new skeletons to minecraft.
body:
This mod is a mod with different types of skeletons. These skeletons provide some extra challenge to your game and are pretty fun to fight!
Some skeletons include:  
-Headless Berserker

-Berserker

-Gravedigger

-Crying Skeleton

-Raging Skeleton

-Piggyback

This mod will not be receiving any more updates as I lost the file... sorry about that...  
**THIS MOD DOES NOT HAVE ANY DEPENDENCIES**
